summary: Example yellow review pack for a non-production API contract change.
problem: A future worker proposes a bounded API contract change that affects callers.
recommendation: Hold for human approval until contract consumers and rollback path are reviewed.
alternatives: Reject and keep the existing contract
Approve only after additional consumer tests are attached
risk_assessment: Callers may break if the contract is promoted without review
This pack has no merge, deploy, or production authority
execution_if_approved: Record human approval as append-only evidence
Dispatch only the authorized bounded slice
Run verifier and preserve evidence before any promotion
cost_of_rejection: The proposed contract change remains unmerged and no runtime behavior changes.
